title: C SCHC test suites absent from CI on this branch (no testcase.yaml for lichen/tests/schc)
description: lichen/tests/schc/ is a standalone CMake project with NO testcase.yaml; ci.yml twisters only lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec (ci.yml:194). lichen/tests/schc_generic/ (Twister) is also not in CI on this branch. So the C SCHC suite - the only C-side guard for rules 0-4 wire output - never runs in CI; regressions like the rule-5 fall-through (mmgu.3) had no chance of being caught. Fix: add testcase.yaml + wire into the twister CI matrix.
